title: siku 1057, Beach Buggy, Metal,Plastic, Blue, Rubber tyres, Toy vehicle for children
features: Detailed toy model of a dune buggy, For play and collection
Robust and stable frame made of high-quality plastic, Excellent mobility thanks to rubber tyres
Ideal gift for children on a birthday, another special occasion or just because, but also as a decorative gift for adult vehicle enthusiasts
Perfect toy for compact travel, Countless possible combinations within siku's world of play ensure long-lasting fun
Contents: 1x siku 1057 dune buggy toy vehicle, Material: metal/plastic, Dimensions: 7.2 x 3.9 x 2.8 cm, Weight: 0.0362 kg, Colour: Blue, Series: SIKU SUPER
description: From the manufacturer Dune buggy Driving fun on the beach The buggy based on the VW Beetle takes you back to the 60s and 70s. It symbolises a beachy California lifestyle like no other vehicle. Take a trip to the groovy hippie era with this sky blue siku dune buggy. The rubberised tyres on sport rims are your ideal companions for this journey through time. Playing together siku's individual toys and accessories combine with each other in a variety of ways, offering endless possibilities for maximum fun. Whether you prefer realistic combinations or unique designs, anything is possible and everything is allowed. Here, your imagination knows no bounds. Connect, improvise, have fun! Quality for generations For more than 70 years, siku has been synonymous with high-quality toy models. Generations of parents have already experienced the joy of siku and are now ready to share it with their children or grandchildren. The sturdy construction, attention to detail and multifunctionality of each individual model ensure that siku will continue to inspire children with the magic of play.
